hooks.command: { read -r json; f=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'genai-engine/ui/src/.*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd /home/user/arthur-engine/genai-engine/ui && node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
